backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the accident documentation backend, defining data types (AccidentReport, UserProfile, etc.) and providing shared functions for user profile management, photo upload, fault analysis, and accident report CRUD operations with access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three feature IDs to their implementation files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering FaultMatrixPanel expansion, faultMatrix.ts scenario coverage, and FaultReferenceDisplay updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for new report, reports list, report detail, and fault reference pages, wrapped in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/AccidentReportFo: Form component for creating accident reports, collecting vehicle info, photos, incident details, and surroundings, then submitting via the useCreateReport mutation and navigating to the new report's detail page.
frontend/src/components/ContributoryNegl: Collapsible panel displaying UK contributory negligence framework data including fault-split scenario cards with visual percentage bars and legal precedent cards sourced from negligenceData.
frontend/src/components/DiscrepancyAlert: Renders a destructive alert when a red-light violation discrepancy exists between witness testimony and AI-detected traffic signal state, displaying both values side-by-side and prompting adjuster review.
frontend/src/components/FaultMatrixPanel: Displays a collapsible fault matrix panel listing accident scenarios with fault percentage bars for Party A and B, highlighting the active scenario that matches the current violation type.
frontend/src/components/FaultReferenceDi: Shows a detailed fault reference card for a given scenario key, including party fault percentage bars, a stacked visual bar, and sections for Highway Code, RTA 1988, and case law references.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header navigation (New Report, My Reports, Fault Reference), a content outlet, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/LegalReferencePa: Renders a collapsible panel of legal references (Highway Code rules, RTA 1988 sections, and case law) relevant to the detected violations, merging violation-specific and general references with deduplication.
frontend/src/components/LiabilityDisplay: Displays a liability assessment card with a proportional color-coded bar and percentage breakdown for two parties, with a pending state when liability data is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/NextStepsPanel.t: Collapsible panel that displays categorized post-accident guidance (immediate actions, reporting, claims, legal options, contacts) using an accordion layout driven by static nextStepsData.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Displays a grid of uploaded accident photos with blob URL generation from raw image data, and a modal dialog with previous/next navigation for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: File input component that accepts JPEG/PNG/WebP images, converts them to ExternalBlob instances, shows previews in a grid, and exposes the selected photos via an onChange callback.
frontend/src/components/ReportDetail.tsx: Full detail view for a single accident report, rendering liability split, violations, legal references, contributory negligence, fault matrix, next steps, and a photo gallery in a structured multi-card layout.
frontend/src/components/ReportList.tsx: Fetches and displays all accident reports sorted by date as clickable cards showing thumbnail, fault badge, violation count, and vehicle info, with an empty state prompt to create a new report.
frontend/src/components/ScenarioSelector: Grid of selectable scenario buttons (rear-end, red-light, lane-change, etc.) each with an icon and description, used to filter fault assessment and Highway Code references.
frontend/src/components/SpeedDisplay.tsx: React component that displays calculated vehicle velocity in both m/s and mph, with color-coded styling and a speed label derived from utility functions.
frontend/src/components/TrafficSignsDisp: React component that renders a list of detected traffic signs as cards with icons, badges, position info, and simulated confidence percentages.
frontend/src/components/ViolationsDispla: React component that displays detected traffic violations as styled cards with icons and timestamps, or a 'no violations' success state if the list is empty.
frontend/src/data/faultMatrix.ts: Static data defining fault percentage splits and contributing factors for common collision scenarios (e.g. rear-end, red light, lane change) used for liability assessment.
frontend/src/data/legalReferences.ts: Static UK legal reference data mapping traffic violation types to relevant Highway Code rules, Road Traffic Act 1988 sections, and supporting case law entries.
frontend/src/data/negligenceData.ts: Static data defining the UK contributory negligence framework, including fault-split scenarios with percentages and legal precedents under the Law Reform (Contributory Negligence) Act 1945.
frontend/src/data/nextSteps.ts: Static guidance data organized into categories (immediate actions, reporting obligations, claims process) describing post-incident steps with legal references for UK road traffic accidents.
frontend/src/data/scenarioReferences.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a data map of accident scenario references including Highway Code rules, Road Traffic Act 1988 sections, case law, and fault percentage breakdowns for scenarios like rear-end, red-light, and lane-change collisions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on accident reports and user profiles against the ICP backend actor, including report creation with photo and traffic sign handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useVelocityCalculatio: Simple hook that computes velocity in m/s and mph from distance and time inputs using memoized calculations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system, including tokens for the Fault Reference Tool.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/FaultReferencePage.ts: Page component for the Fault Reference Tool that lets users select an accident scenario and displays relevant legal references and fault breakdowns, with a disclaimer about educational use.
frontend/src/pages/NewReportPage.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the AccidentReportForm component with a heading for creating a new accident report.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays a single accident report by ID from the URL params, showing loading skeletons or an error state as appropriate.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the ReportList component with a heading for viewing all saved accident reports.
frontend/src/utils/speedColorCoding.ts: Utility functions that return Tailwind CSS class strings and label text for color-coding speed values into low, medium, and high categories.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and fault reference tool design tokens.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking three existing features related to expanding fault matrix Party A/B breakdowns, scenario coverage, and fault reference display in the frontend.
